prover_estimate.note: estimated_prover_time_score is for plotting unmeasured candidates. Measured rows use the measured full commit+prove wall clock; unmeasured rows use the calibrated log-ratio model. Reported error metrics are leave-one-out over measured anchors.

selection_policy.reason: Verifier score is ordinal and can rank-invert when transcript or folding bucket ratios differ by schedule shape. Use it to narrow the candidate set, then measure native transaction gas on the shortlist before selecting a Solidity verifier schedule.
